title: Source of Modern Contraception Methods
description: Percent distribution of users of modern contraceptive methods aged 15 to 49 years by most recent source of method, according to method. Source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2022 and 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey.

chartData.title: Source of Modern Contraception Methods
notes: Each cell represents one percentage point of modern-method users for that year.
Some methods are excluded because sample sizes were too small to produce reliable estimates.
"0.0" indicates that an estimate is less than 0.05 percent.
chartData.source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2022 and 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey

tables.title: Source
tables.subtitle: Users of modern contraceptive methods aged 15 to 49 years.

rows.label: Rural health center/ urban health center/ lying-in clinic
Total number of women aged 15 to 49 years

footnotes: “NA” denotes that an estimate is not reported.
"0.0" indicates that an estimate is less than 0.05 percent.

1. Total includes other modern methods, including other modern methods mentioned by respondent and male sterilization, patch, emergency contraception, and standard days method. but excludes lactational amenorrhea method (LAM), mucus/Billings/ovulation, basal body temperature, and symptothermal methods
2. An asterisk indicates that a figure is based on fewer than 25 unweighted cases and has been suppressed.
3. Details may not add up to total due to rounding.
tables.source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2022 and 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey
